pinpointemail.dedicatedippool.tags.CfnAb: An object that defines the tags (keys and values) that you want to associate with the dedicated IP pool.

pinpointemail.dedicatedippool.tags.Key.Description: One part of a key-value pair that defines a tag. The maximum length of a tag key is 128 characters. The minimum length is 1 character.  If you specify tags for the dedicated IP pool, then this value is required.

pinpointemail.dedicatedippool.tags.Value.Description: The optional part of a key-value pair that defines a tag. The maximum length of a tag value is 256 characters. The minimum length is 0 characters. If you don’t want a resource to have a specific tag value, don’t specify a value for this parameter. Amazon Pinpoint will set the value to an empty string.
